faq.q: How many GCC centers does America Online operate in India?
faq.a: America Online operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India. Two are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does America Online have GCC centers in?
faq.a: America Online's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does America Online run in India?
faq.a: America Online runs it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at America Online's India GCCs?
faq.a: America Online's India centers employ in the 101 to 200 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.
